title: Create neuron

dissolveDelay.title: Set dissolve delay
dissolveDelay.description: Longer dissolve delays mint higher rewards.

maturity.label: Manage rewards
maturity.description: Choose how to handle your minting rewards.

state.label: Initial state
state.description: Choose the starting state for your neuron.

processing.title: Creating your neuron.
processing.warning: Please don't close this page. This process may take a few seconds.

infoBoxes.whatIsStaking: Locking your ICP creates a neuron that mints voting rewards. You can mint up to ~{{maxApy}} maturity depending on your lock period and participation.
infoBoxes.dissolveDelayWarning: The lock period can only be increased, never decreased. The countdown only begins when you start unlocking.
infoBoxes.lockedDescription: Locked: neuron stays locked, minting maximum rewards. Start unlocking later when you want to withdraw.
infoBoxes.unlockingDescription: Unlocking: countdown begins immediately. After the lock period, you can withdraw your ICP.

errors.cannotStake: You need ICP to lock. Please buy or deposit ICP first.

confirmNavigation: Your neuron is being created, leaving this page may cause unexpected results. Are you sure you want to leave?
confirmNavigationUnsaved: Your progress will not be saved. Are you sure you want to leave?
